Name: Dataset of Electroencephalograms of Juvenile Offenders
Description: A Resource for the Study of Neurocognition in Juvenile Delinquency
Acknowledgements: The authors thank Ronald Ruiz for his help during the data collection process and Sergio Miranda for his dedication to data processing and cleaning
Funding: MINISTERIO DE CIENCIA TECNOLOGÍA E INNOVACIÓN (MINCIENCIAS) BPIN 2020000100006

GeneratedBy.Name: Biosemi
GeneratedBy.Description: All EEG signals were recorded using the Biosemi ActiveTwo system in 140 subjects, 74 juvenile offenders and 66 juvenile no offenders
